storyboard.content: I'm extremely thirsty and having to urinate every 30 to 60 minutes, even through the night
Today I started feeling confused and I have severe stomach pain
My breath has a fruity smell and I feel like I might pass out
The thirst, tiredness, and frequent urination have been getting worse over 7 days, but today everything got dramatically worse
I've lost 15 pounds in just one week even though I've been eating normally, and I'm in acute distress
I'm a 19-year-old woman with no prior diabetes diagnosis that I know of
